checks.name: required_artifacts
checks.message: All configured artifact files are present.

checks.name: web_experience_contract
checks.message: Web experience JSON matches its schema.

checks.name: nonpartisan_language
checks.message: No prohibited partisan language detected.

checks.name: presentation_scene_count
checks.message: Web presentation contains the expected 16 scenes.

checks.name: field_guide_timings
checks.message: Field guide timings are internally consistent.

checks.name: web_speaker_tracks
checks.message: Web speaker tracks are structurally consistent.

checks.name: handout_length
checks.message: Handout length is within the target range at 300 words.

checks.name: lms_requirements
checks.message: All LMS modules include objectives and quiz questions.

checks.name: appendices_labeling
checks.message: Appendices section is present and labeled.

checks.name: definition_consistency
checks.message: Definition language differs more than expected across deliverables.

checks.name: web_alignment
checks.message: Every web scene is linked to one or more manual sections.

checks.name: presenter_separation
checks.message: Presenter-only content is structurally separated from public scene content.

checks.name: resource_links
checks.message: Web resource links are present and placeholder flags are consistent.

checks.name: traceability_support
checks.message: Manual sections and web scenes maintain source support or explicit generated-scaffolding labels.

checks.name: llm_review::unsupported claims
checks.message: The introductory letter makes broad claims about the civic duty of lawyers and the impact of Rule of Law Day without direct citation to source material. However, these claims are generally supported by the listed canons and are appropriate for a framing letter.
details: No action required, but consider adding a footnote or reference to the relevant canons for clarity.

checks.name: llm_review::inconsistent definitions
checks.message: The definition of 'Rule of Law' and its four principles is presented in both sections, but the language and order differ slightly. This could cause confusion for learners.
details: Standardize the definition and order of the four principles across all sections for consistency.

checks.name: llm_review::partisan wording
checks.message: No overtly partisan language detected. The manual emphasizes nonpartisan values and explicitly states that the Rule of Law is not a political issue.

checks.name: llm_review::manual / web drift
checks.message: No evidence of drift from source canons or web resources. Generated scaffolding is clearly labeled.

checks.name: llm_review::implausible speaker timings
checks.message: No speaker timings present in the manual content.

checks.name: llm_review::presenter-only content leaking into public presentation content
checks.message: No presenter-only notes or content detected in public-facing sections.

checks.name: llm_review::missing or mislabeled resource placeholders
checks.message: No explicit resource placeholders (e.g., for slides, handouts, or external links) are present in the 'How to Use This Manual' section, which may limit usability for presenters.
details: Add clear placeholders or references for supplementary resources where appropriate.

checks.name: llm_review::missing LMS learning objectives or assessments
checks.message: No learning objectives or assessment items are present in the manual. This is a critical omission for LMS integration and effective civic education.
details: Add a section at the beginning or end of the manual listing clear learning objectives and suggested assessment questions or activities.

checks.name: llm_review::mislabeled appendices
checks.message: No appendices are present or referenced in the provided content.
details: No action required unless appendices are intended.

checks.name: llm_review::source hierarchy violations
checks.message: Source hierarchy is respected; primary canons are cited for substantive claims, and generated scaffolding is clearly labeled.

summary: QA status is warning. 24 checks ran with 0 failures and 4 warnings.
